title: audit and fix rich body encoding (string-of-JSON)
description:
IMPROVEMENTS.md §13: The body field for application/jmap-chat-rich MUST be a JSON-encoded string whose top-level parsed value is an object — i.e. body is a String containing escaped JSON, not a raw embedded JSON object.

Audit current types.rs Message struct: if body is typed as serde_json::Value or an embedded struct, that is a spec-conformance bug.

Fix: body field must deserialize as String, then callers call serde_json::from_str::<RichBody>(&message.body) to parse it.

Test oracle: hand-write a JSON fixture where body is a quoted string containing escaped JSON (per spec), assert it deserializes to the correct RichBody struct. A fixture where body is an embedded object must fail deserialization.

Fixture files: tests/fixtures/message_rich_body_valid.json, message_rich_body_invalid.json
